title: Cassetu's Building Pack
description: Mods + Shaders that Cassetu uses in his builds
body:
Axiom, Shaders and everything you'll need to start building **GIANT** megastructures!!

This Modpack is often used by Cassetu, and has the Bobby mod, so your builds will load no matter how large/long they are. 

This doesn't contain that much optimization so you'll have to set it up yourself if you want better fps.

(Hours used by Cassetu: 500)

Current Modpack Versions (And different Recording Software):
- 1.21.11 (Flashback)
- 1.21.1 (Flashback)
- 1.21.1 (Replay)
